memoryArtifacts.headline: Biography of Thomas Moulton
memoryArtifacts.description: THOMAS MOULTON [Tho: Molton]. He was born circa 1605,67 and was perhaps a brother of John Moulton, coming also from Ormesby, though no record is found. He came first to Newbury, lived in Hampton for s …

popularStory.headline: THOMAS & MARTHA  (UNKNOWN) MOULTON, BIOGRAPHICAL ITEMS
popularStory.description:
BIOGRAPHICAL SKETCH
    Thomas Moulton, the son or Robert and Mary (Smith) Moulton, probably was born in Ormesby, Norfolk, England, where he was baptized (christened) on 16 June 1608.  His sister Mary …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Moulton於1608年6月16日之前出生在英國諾福爾可史可拉特比時，他的父親Robert Moulton44歲，母親Mary Smythe31歲。他於1637年與Martha在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1638年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓。他去世於從1699年到1703年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克約克 維利亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Moulton于1608年6月16日之前出生在英国諾福爾可史可拉特比时，他的父亲Robert Moulton44岁，母亲Mary Smythe31岁。他于1637年与Martha在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1638年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾咸頓。他去世于从1699年到1703年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼約克約克約克 維利亞。

nameMeanings.name: Moulton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Cheshire and Lancashire): habitational name from one or more of the places called Moulton (Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire, Suffolk, North Yorkshire), most of which are named with the Old English personal name Mūl(a), the Old Norse personal name Múli, or Old English mūl ‘mule’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Molden
meanings: metronymic from the Middle English female personal name Mold, a form of Maud, with the characteristically West Midland genitival suffix -en.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Historical Boundaries: 1716: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

Historical Boundaries: 1652: Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1664: Maine, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1668: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1680: Massachusetts Claim, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1691: York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America 1776: York, Massachusetts, United States 1820: York, Maine, United States

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Moulton was born before 16 June 1608, in Scratby, Norfolk, England, his father, Robert Moulton, was 44 and his mother, Mary Smythe, was 31. He married Martha in 1637, in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He lived in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America in 1638. He died from 1699 to 1703, in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in York Village, York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Moulton est né avant 16 juin 1608, à Scratby, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Robert Moulton, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Mary Smythe, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Martha en 1637, à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il a vécu à Hampton, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1638. Il est décédé du 1699 au 1703, à York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à York Village, York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Moulton vor 16. Juni 1608 in Scratby, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Moulton 44 und seine Mutter Mary Smythe 31. Er hat 1637 in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Martha geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1638 hat er in Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb von 1699 bis 1703 in York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in York Village, York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Moulton è nato il prima del 16 giugno 1608 nel Scratby, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Robert Moulton, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Mary Smythe, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Martha nel 1637, nel Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Vissuto a Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America nel 1638. Morì da 1699 a 1703, nel York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a York Village, York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Moultonが1608年6月16日以前にイギリスノーフォルクスクラトビーで生まれた時，父Robert Moultonは44歳，母Mary Smytheは31歳であった。1637年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンでMarthaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1638年にはイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアハンプトンに住んでいた。彼はから1699年まで1703年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークヨークヨーク ヴィラッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Moulton(이)가 1608년 6월 16일 이전 영국 노르폴크 스크라트비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Moulton(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Smythe(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1637년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 Martha(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1638년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 함프턴에서 살았다. 그는 1699년 부터 1703년 까지 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크 요르크 요르크 비라지에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Moulton родился перед 16 июнь 1608 г. в местности скратби, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Moulton было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Smythe, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha в 1637 г. в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он жил в местности хамптон, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1638 году. Он умер с 1699 по 1703 в местности ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности ерк вилладж, ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Moulton nació antes de 16 de junio de 1608, en Scratby, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Moulton, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Mary Smythe, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Martha en 1637, en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Vivió en Hampton, New Hampshire, British Colonial America en 1638. Murió desde 1699 hasta 1703, en York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en York Village, York, York, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
